prs_created.title: feat: add string module bindings and tests
prs_created.description: Added Fable.Beam.String with 28 bindings (is_empty, length, lowercase, uppercase, titlecase, casefold, reverse, concat, slice, trim, pad, equal, find, findFrom, prefix, splitFirst, splitAll, replaceFirst, replaceAll, toInteger, toFloat, toGraphemes) and 22 tests. Also updated README module table. Push rejected. Patch in run 24595953899.

notes: No open issues besides #67 (CI caching info) and #62 (monthly summary). All PRs merged. String bindings PR push rejected (patch in run 24595953899). CI caching patch still needs manual application (#67). README updated to include Binary, String, Math, Proplists modules.
